assumptions: Z-Guide should remain a display-safe prompt layer
Z-UX should own screen progression and UX state
risks: prompt events may be rendered without proper safety checks
guidance packets may be confused with UX orchestration logic
unsafe prompt wording may slip into display state
next_required_validation: Hermes review before packet-level runtime integration
primary_user_goal: Help the user move through the ZILFIT flow with clear, safe, low-friction live guidance.
fallback_rule: If display safety or confidence is weak, send fallback prompt mode only.
